doc_go_contract: resolves parser-supported files into stable repo-root file sets for the Go collector

key_types.Options: controls filesystem discovery: IgnoredDirs, IgnoredExtensions, IgnoreHidden, PreservedHiddenPrefixes, HonorGitignore, HonorPCGIgnore, IgnoredPathGlobs, PreservedPathGlobs
key_types.PathGlobRule: one repo-relative glob rule with Pattern and Reason string
key_types.DiscoveryStats: per-run counters: DirsSkippedByName, FilesSkippedByExtension, FilesSkippedByContent, DirsSkippedByUser, FilesSkippedByUser, FilesSkippedHidden, FilesSkippedGitignore, FilesSkippedPCGIgnore
key_types.SupportedFileMatcher: func(path string) bool; supplied by parser registry

internal_flow: collectSupportedFiles: WalkDir with ignoredDirs, ignoredExts, hiddenPath, ignoredPathGlobs, SupportedFileMatcher; symlink check via isExternalSymlink
groupFilesByRepository: nearestRepositoryRoot walks up to find .git marker; cache for O(1) repeat lookups
per repo: sort files, optionally filterRepoFilesByGitignore, filterRepoFilesByPCGIgnore
gitignore_handling: conservative: ambiguous .gitignore rules include the file; downstream parsers reject what they cannot handle
pcgignore: .pcgignore file at repo root, applied after .gitignore when HonorPCGIgnore=true
external_symlinks: isExternalSymlink skips symlinks that resolve outside scanRoot

stats_aggregation.TotalFilesSkipped: sum of all per-reason file skip counters

telemetry: discovery does not emit metrics or spans directly; DiscoveryStats are returned to the caller (NativeRepositorySnapshotter) which records them via Instruments.DiscoveryFilesSkipped
